notes: IBM publishes AI governance frameworks and security guidance.

data.description: Whitepaper-based framework for governing generative AI.
data.notes: Whitepaper-based framework for governing generative AI. Organized into domains and controls with specific requirements. Covers data governance, model lifecycle, operational controls. Published by IBM Institute for Business Value.

children.description: Control identifier within the IBM Generative AI Controls Framework. Exact ID format not yet documented — pattern accepts any non-empty string pending further research.

data.note: Control ID format requires further research. The framework is published as a whitepaper; control identifiers may follow a domain-code plus number pattern but this has not been confirmed.
